scripts.build: npm run clean-dist ; npm run build-id && npm run build-code
scripts.clean-inst: shx --silent rm ../docs/index.html ; shx --silent rm ../docs/*index.js ../docs/index.js.LICENSE.txt ; shx --silent rm ../docs/favicon.ico ; shx --silent rm ../docs/css/ ; shx --silent rm ../docs/img/ ; shx --silent rm ../docs/js/ ; shx --silent rm ../docs/locales/
scripts.copy-public: shx cp -r public/css/ public/img/ public/js/ public/locales/ ../docs/ && shx cp public/favicon.ico public/index.html ../docs/
scripts.install: npm run clean-inst ; npm run copy-dist && npm run copy-public
